name: Pomegranate
summary: A jewel-seeded fruit rich in punicalagins — unusually large antioxidant polyphenols studied mainly for blood pressure.
superfoodReason: Exceptionally high in punicalagin antioxidants, with meta-analysed trial evidence for lowering blood pressure.

benefits.mechanism: Pomegranate polyphenols support nitric-oxide availability and reduce oxidative stress in blood vessels, helping arteries relax. A meta-analysis of randomized trials found pomegranate juice lowered both systolic and diastolic blood pressure.

citations.title: Effects of pomegranate juice on blood pressure: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Sahebkar et al., Pharmacol Res 2017)

surprisingFacts.text: Punicalagins are among the largest polyphenol molecules in the human diet — and pomegranate juice's antioxidant activity in lab assays often outmeasures green tea or red wine.
